event: Wrapped doll sculpture in green fabric
description: A sculptural assemblage of a doll-like form entirely wrapped and bound in green fabric. The figure has a roughly discernible head, torso, and arms, all obscured by layers of tightly wound green cloth and string. The wrapping creates a mummy-like effect, with the features of the underlying form only vaguely suggested through the fabric. The piece stands vertically against a plain white background. The texture is rough and layered, with visible seams, folds, and binding cord around the midsection.
